kernel_subject: block: pass a queue_limits argument to blk_mq_alloc_disk
stage1_reason: Three of four commits explicitly adapt to kernel API changes: blk_mq_alloc_disk signature changed to accept queue_limits parameter (commit 27e32cd23fed), and bus_type made const (commit cb8e8570d5c9). Driver changes replace multiple blk_queue_* calls with single queue_limits struct passed to blk_mq_alloc_disk.
stage2_reason: Driver commits 9f633ecd4304 and f93b43ae3fea explicitly adapt to blk_mq_alloc_disk API change introduced by kernel commit 27e32cd23fed, which adds queue_limits parameter.
